text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, starting my day with a glass of water and a short stretching routine. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit—while reading the news. My work schedule begins at 9 a.m., and I spend most of the day at my desk, focusing on tasks and attending online meetings. Around 5 p.m., I go for a 30-minute run or do some yoga, which helps me relax. In the evening, I cook dinner, watch a TV show, and read for a while before bed. This consistency keeps me balanced and productive.
